examples: Clasper also said that there had been no further dealing with the superlative U.S. investment banking group Goldman Sachs, which headed a consortium that made an 870 pence a share bid last month.
And just to put the lid on any suppositions on that figure, BAA's Chief Executive Mike Clasper has said that the value of the airport operator is "way, way north of 810 pence" a share.
